author: barnabasbusa
content:
```
 ERROR fork_choice_store::store:5042: attesting balance should never go below zero
    (block: 0x109cfb31545b9262816d8ebbab9fba5d91c52e904eb9636ae02391552838b090 with payload None,
     balance kind: empty, current value: 0, add value: -32000000000) peers=[13/200]
```

author: barnabasbusa
content:
10 of these in 24h, 8 of them clustered at 2026-06-08 08:51:01 and 2 earlier at 2026-06-07 12:37:32. Both events implicate the same block root 0x109cfb31…b090 and
  the symptom is a signed-integer underflow when subtracting an attestation balance from a fork-choice node whose current balance is already 0 (variants: subtract 32
   / 64 / 96 ETH from 0). One line even shows current value: 32_000_000_000, add value: -64_000_000_000 — i.e. trying to subtract 64 ETH from a 32 ETH balance.

author: barnabasbusa
content:
```
 # Reproduce
  panda execute --code "from ethpandaops import clickhouse; \
  print(clickhouse.query('clickhouse-raw', \"\"\"SELECT Timestamp, substring(Body,1,500) FROM external.otel_logs \
  WHERE ResourceAttributes['network']='glamsterdam-devnet-5' AND ResourceAttributes['host.name']='grandine-nethermind-1' \
  AND ResourceAttributes['container.name']='beacon' AND Body LIKE '% ERROR %' \
  AND Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY Timestamp DESC\"\"\"))"
```
